text: Being here, I feel as though I am walking through a space that values both technology and thoughtful inquiry. The first area seems sterile yet full of potential—perhaps awaiting minds to fill it with ideas and discussion. As I move into the R+D display, I sense the relentless march of innovation and human creativity. The vibrant colors and bold designs on the wall fill me with a sense of curiosity and possibility. It makes me reflect on how environments shape not just our actions but also our thoughts.
